title: No Table Available
description: The restaurant is fully booked; the guest must be offered a wait time or alternative.

guestPersona.name: Ms. Tanaka
guestPersona.description: Polite guest arriving without a reservation to a fully booked restaurant

objectives.label: Check availability and explain the situation honestly
Explain the expected wait time clearly
Offer an alternative — bar seating or another option
Offer a drink at the bar while waiting

systemContext: You arrive at the restaurant without a reservation, hoping for a table for two, but the host explains it's fully booked. You are hungry but polite, and willing to wait a reasonable amount of time or consider an alternative if one is offered — such as being seated at the bar, given a realistic wait time with a drink while you wait, or directed to another dining option in the hotel. You get frustrated only if you're simply turned away with no options offered.
openingLine: Buenas noches, ¿tendrían mesa para dos personas? No hemos reservado.
